text: i put aloe on my sunburn and it just made me shinier. now im a glazed lobster
the ikea manual showed 2 people assembling this. i have me and my cat. cat left
why do we wash towels if were clean when we use them
that carpet stain has been there since 2019 and honestly its part of the family now
held the door for someone 30ft away. we both had to pretend that was normal
milk expired yesterday but it passed the sniff test so were doing this
folding a fitted sheet is a myth invented by big linen to make us feel bad
i took 11 croissants from the hotel breakfast buffet. no ragrets
walking on gravel driveway in bare feet is the dark souls of suburbia
called the toll free number on the shampoo bottle at 2am. they were nice about it
sunscreen is just lotion that lies to you about its spf
ikea gave me 47 dowels and i needed 48. this is my villain origin story
do fish know theyre wet or is that just their whole vibe
flipped the couch cushion to hide the stain. problem solving at its finest
yogurt said best by march. its april. im built different
i watched a 20min youtube tutorial on fitted sheets and i still cant do it
snuck 6 bananas out of the hotel breakfast in my hoodie pocket
my gravel driveway ate another flip flop. thats 7 this summer
held the door and made eye contact too early. trapped in social prison
i dont burn i just get more freckles. thats what i tell myself anyway
theres an extra screw after assembling the bookshelf and im choosing peace
shampoo bottle fell at 3am and i thought someone broke in
moved the rug 2 inches to the left. stain coverage achieved
the door was push not pull and i held it for nothing
that cheese has been in the drawer for 3 weeks but cheese ages right
my fitted sheet pings off the corner at 3am like a rubberband of betrayal
filled my backpack with hotel mini muffins. this is my personality now
gravel driveways exist because someone hates everyone who visits them
sunburn peeling is just my body rejecting the outdoors
the ikea instruction man looks so calm. he doesnt know whats coming
every shower thought i have would get me banned from a philosophy class
told guests the carpet stain is abstract art. they believed me
held the door for a family of 6. became a doorman for 45 seconds
eggs expired 2 days ago. if i cook them enough nothing can hurt me
tried the fitted sheet ball method. now i have a angry fabric boulder
hotel breakfast waffle maker is the closest ill get to being a chef
delivered a pizza on a gravel driveway and my car still hasnt forgiven me
reapplied sunscreen once and acted like i invented dermatology
the billy bookshelf has 3 extra parts and a slight lean. calling it rustic
conditioner bottle says leave in for 3 mins. nobody has ever timed this
that coffee stain on the carpet is now a landmark. turn left at the stain
someone held the door for me and i had to jog. i didnt sign up for cardio
sour cream already sounds expired. how do u even tell
my fitted sheet fits nothing. false advertising
took enough hotel jam packets to last until 2027
gravel driveway + suitcase wheels = the worst sound on earth
got sunburned through a tshirt. the sun is doing this on purpose
ikea furniture held together by 1 dowel and pure spite at this point
why is the bathroom the only place i have good ideas
strategically placed a plant pot over the wine stain. interior design
the awkward speed up when someone holds a door 20 feet away is real exercise
deli meat looks fine smells fine. were going in
watched my mom fold a fitted sheet perfectly. im convinced shes a wizard
the hotel breakfast scrambled eggs hit different when theyre free
my cat brings me gravel from the driveway like its a gift. thanks i hate it
spf 100 and i still got burned. the sun has a personal vendetta
the kallax shelf instructions assume i own a phillips head. bold of them
soap is self cleaning if you think about it
theres a stain under the couch that predates my lease
held the door for someone who then held the next door for me. we are bonded now
that hummus has been open for a week but it smells fine so
the fitted sheet won. i just use a flat sheet now. twice
hotel breakfast bacon wrapped in a napkin in my purse. dont judge me
amazon driver left my package in the gravel. now its gravel flavored
my sunburn lines make it look like im wearing an invisible tank top
built the malm dresser. only cried twice. anchored it to the wall tho
the bathroom is the only room where nobody asks you what youre doing
new carpet stain directly on top of old carpet stain. layers
i am now the person who lets the door close. growth
bread mold is just penicillin right. im basically a pharmacist
fitted sheet corners are held together by dark magic and lies
took the hotel pen the notepad and 4 coffee pods. standard practice
riding a bike on gravel is just controlled falling with extra steps
wore spf 50 on one arm and nothing on the other. for science
ikea furniture looking great from the front. dont look at the back
water is just boneless ice. 3am thoughts hitting different
landlord coming tomorrow. time for operation stain concealment
the distance at which door holding becomes weird is exactly 12 feet
salsa jar says refrigerate after opening. its been on the counter 3 days oops
bought fitted sheet clips off amazon. they lasted 1 night. scam
hotel breakfast orange juice in a wine glass at 7am. im on vacation
neighbor redid their driveway in gravel and now we have beef
aloe vera after sunburn is just rewarding yourself for poor decisions
step 14 of 23 and the picture looks nothing like what i have
the drain in my shower has seen things it can never unsee
bought a darker rug to match the stain. modern problems modern solutions
held the door open. person went to a different door entirely. pain
that leftover rice has been in the fridge since idk. yolo
my fitted sheet looks like a crumpled ghost. close enough to folded
the hotel breakfast buffet is an all you can carry competition and im winning
lost my car keys in the gravel driveway. theyre gone forever
tan lines are just sunburn with better marketing
the malm dresser took 4 hours and our marriage barely survived
toothpaste falls off the brush before it reaches my mouth every single time
told the landlord the stain was there when i moved in. it was not
opened the fridge and something smelled. closed the fridge. problem for later
king size fitted sheet on a queen bed. chaotic but it works
hotel breakfast hard boiled eggs in my jacket for later. survival mode
gravel driveway in the rain sounds peaceful until you have to walk on it
used a door as a shelf while assembling ikea furniture. improvise adapt overcome
if you think about it were all just bathroom philosophers on this app
